styleBrief.text: Full-colour painted keyframes with soft edges and cinematic light, used to preview mood and staging. Realistic proportions, no visible line art.

lineAndFinish.text: Soft brushed edges and blocked shapes; finish reads as a colour key, not a drawing. No outlines.

valueAndAccent.text: Wide value range with warm key against cool shadow; torchlight is the accent that draws the eye.

accents.name: Torch
accents.meaning: Warm light on the focal action only.

guardrails.text: Favor readable cinematic staging; avoid flat graphic looks and harsh outlines.
